message:
Remove unused imports and dead constants from beads page and HUD

app/beads/page.tsx:
- Removed 6 unused lucide-react icons (Share2, Binary, GitBranch,
  CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, Clock) from the import — only
  ArrowRight and Network are actually used in the page JSX
- Removed unused cn import from lib/utils
- Removed unused FrankenContainer and NeuralPulse imports from
  franken-elements (these are used inside BeadsView, not the page)
- Removed the unused VIEWER_REPO constant (GitHub URL string)
- Removed the unused graphStats array (4 stat objects with icon
  references) — this data is now rendered dynamically from the
  SQLite database inside the BeadsView component

components/bead-hud.tsx:
- Removed unused AnimatedNumber import from ./animated-number

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
